english_text:
PERMANENT NOT EXTREME
EXTREME IMMEDIATE TEMPORARY
Unconditional LOVE, CARE, Genuine CONCERN, MERCY
SUBTLE, ONE SIDED, PROTECTION, STRUGGLE
alt_text: Teaching diagram of the root r-ḥ-m (mercy). Bottom box: the root 'رحم' surrounded by clouds 'SUBTLE / ONE SIDED / PROTECTION / STRUGGLE'. Arrow up to 'رحمۃ' labelled 'Unconditional LOVE / CARE / Genuine CONCERN / MERCY'. From there, two arrows up to 'الرحیم' (labelled 'PERMANENT NOT EXTREME') and 'الرحمن' (labelled 'EXTREME IMMEDIATE TEMPORARY').
notes: Pedagogical: contrasts the divine names al-Rahman (intense + immediate mercy) and al-Rahim (sustained mercy) as derived from the root rḥm and the noun raḥma.
